title: Fry Ginger American Stir-fry
description: A low-calorie-friendly and crispy dish featuring ginger in a fermented base that's perfect for date nights and light meals.
instructions: Peel and finely chop the ginger.
Mix the chopped ginger, minced garlic, soy sauce, cornstarch, and sesame seeds in a bowl until well combined.
Heat peanut oil in a pan over medium-high heat. Add the mixture from step 2 to the pan and stir-fry for about 3 minutes or until golden brown and fragrant.
Slice jicama into thin strips and scallions into thin slices.
Add sliced jicama and scallion slices to the pan with the fried ginger mixture. Stir well to coat evenly, ensuring all ingredients are cooked through.
Serve hot as a snack or light meal.
